projects.title: GridMaster Theme Sections
projects.tagline: Custom layout blocks for Shopify Online Store 2.0 themes
projects.description: GridMaster adds powerful app blocks to Shopify OS 2.0 themes — Blog Grid, Chart, Feature, Image Gallery, Pricing, Product Grid, Steps, Team, Testimonial, and Timeline. Zero code injection: no Liquid changes, no leftover code after uninstalling.

projects.title: Futurize — Easy Coming Soon
projects.tagline: Stunning coming soon pages for Shopify stores
projects.description: Futurize lets merchants create polished coming soon pages without touching code. Choose from pre-built templates, customize headings, countdowns, subscription forms, social icons, and typography — all from a visual editor.

projects.title: Awesome Posts
projects.tagline: Flexible post shortcode manager for WordPress
projects.description: Awesome Posts is a WordPress plugin that lets you render any post query as a custom shortcode. Adjust layout, format, query filters, and styles through an intuitive visual editor. Compatible with standard and custom post types.

projects.title: Showit Blog Stylist Plugin
projects.tagline: Custom typography and styling for Showit blogs
projects.description: The Showit Blog Stylist plugin transforms the visual presentation of Showit blogs. Change heading fonts, sizes, spacing, and colors without editing CSS — all from a settings panel built specifically for Showit's WordPress blog layer.

projects.title: Gutpress
projects.description: Gutpress is an open-source collection of custom Gutenberg blocks that extend WordPress with reusable, content-focused UI patterns — built with React and the @wordpress/blocks API.
